name: SSH Authorized Keys Modified
description: Detects changes to SSH authorized_keys files - backdoor access
query:
// SSH Authorized Keys Modification
// Adding keys for persistent access
events from endpoint
where file_path contains "authorized_keys"
  and event_type in ("file_create", "file_modify")
group by hostname, username, file_path
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
